docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, KAREN

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $26.96 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT JONES, KAREN

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE, SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY HEARING SET FOR APR-20-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 27, 2009 FOR HEARING ON THE MATTER. THE COURT GAVE MISS JONES AN OPPORTUNITY TO FILE AN OPPOSITION ON OR BEFORE NOON OF APRIL 23, 2009. MS. JONES IS TO INCLUDE WITH HER OPPOSITION A DECLARATION UNDER THE PENALTY OF PERJURY THE REASON FOR THE REQUEST OF THE CONTINUANCE OR THE FAMILY EMERGENCY. REPLY TO BE FILED BY NOON OF APRIL 24, 2009. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-20-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT (OF PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY)
